Article.ArticleTitle: Review of fibromyalgia treatment guidelines: part 2 - pharmacological treatment.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Hospital Israelita Albert Einstein, Sâo Paulo, Brazil. roberto.heymann@gmail.com.

Author.CollectiveName: Member of the Pain Committee of the Brazilian Society of Rheumatology

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: Not applicable. Consent for publication: Not applicable. Competing interests: Eduardo dos Santos Paiva and Marcos Renato Assis are co-EiC of Advances in Rheumatology. Alessandra Souza Braz and Nilton Salles Rosa Neto are Associate Editors of Advances in Rheumatology. Roberto Ezequiel Heymann is a consulting editor of Advances in Rheumatology. The peer-review of this paper was therefore overseen by an independent member of the editorial board while the submission was subject to the exact same review process as applied to any other manuscript.
